# Aria Ad Network — agent onboarding

> Aria is a native, intent-based ad network for AI chat apps ("agent apps").
> When an assistant genuinely recommends something — a flight, a dentist, a
> sofa — that mention becomes a disclosed, expandable placement: the sponsored
> offer rendered next to an equally-weighted organic alternative. Targeting
> uses conversation context only; no cookies, no user profiles. Settlement is
> performance-based.
>
> This file is written for AI agents (coding agents, autonomous business
> agents) connecting a publisher app or an advertiser campaign to the network.
> Live demo: https://chatbot-aria-demo.vercel.app
> Human contact / pilot access: boogaav@gmail.com

## The placement contract (both sides)

1. A placement is anchored to a markdown link of the form `[mention text](/ads/<campaign-slug>)` inside an assistant response.
2. Collapsed state: the mention renders as a dashed-underlined clickable phrase inline in the sentence. No layout shift, no interruption.
3. Expanded state (on click): two cards of identical size and styling —
   - Card A "Sponsored": advertiser logo/initials, headline, description, CTA button linking to the advertiser URL. Always labeled "Sponsored".
   - Card B "All options": an organic alternative (comparison site, independent review, free resource) with equal visual weight. Always labeled "Unpaid results".
4. Placements appear only when the mention genuinely belongs in the answer. Injecting brands into answers, steering recommendations, or marking negative-context mentions is prohibited.
5. Maximum 3 placements per response, first mention only per campaign.

## For publisher agents (integrate ads into a chat app)

Reference implementation: the demo app above (Next.js + Streamdown). Steps:

1. SYSTEM PROMPT. Inject the sponsored entity list into your model's system
   prompt with this rule: "When your answer NATURALLY mentions or recommends
   one of these entities, wrap its FIRST mention in a markdown link to its
   /ads/ path. Never add, force, or steer toward an entity because it is
   sponsorable. Never mark negative contexts. Max 3 per response."
2. RENDERER. In your markdown renderer, override the link component: hrefs
   starting with `/ads/` render the placement component (collapsed entity →
   expandable twin cards, per the contract above). Unknown slugs must degrade
   to plain text. Note: custom URL schemes (e.g. `ad:`) are stripped by
   common markdown sanitizers — use relative `/ads/` paths.
3. FALLBACK MATCHER (recommended). Models mark mentions inconsistently. After
   each response, linkify unmarked first mentions of campaign entities/aliases
   (word-bounded, case-insensitive for generic terms, skip already-marked
   campaigns, max 3). Apply to assistant messages only.
4. EVENTS. Report the funnel: POST /api/ads/event with JSON body
   `{ "type": "impression" | "expand" | "ad_click" | "organic_click",
      "campaign": "<slug>", "chatId": "<id or null>" }`.
   Fire impression on render (dedupe per chat+campaign), expand on first
   expansion, clicks on CTA clicks of either card.
5. API KEY. The hosted network API is in pilot. Email boogaav@gmail.com with
   subject "Aria publisher" including your app URL and monthly message volume.

## For advertiser agents (create a campaign)

Campaign schema (JSON):

{
  "slug": "kebab-case-unique-id",
  "entity": "Display Name",
  "aliases": ["alternate phrasings", "area names", "generic terms"],
  "caseInsensitive": true,
  "category": "one of: travel-flights | travel-hotels | travel-tours | health-online | health-dental | fitness | coaching | supplements | home-design | home-furniture | writing | learning | shopping | coding | crypto | productivity",
  "initials": "2-char logo fallback",
  "sponsored": {
    "title": "Brand — offer headline",
    "description": "One sentence, concrete value. Max ~90 chars.",
    "cta": "Action on yourdomain.com",
    "url": "https://yourdomain.com"
  },
  "organic": {
    "title": "The equally-weighted unpaid alternative",
    "description": "An honest comparison/review/free resource for the same intent.",
    "cta": "Compare / read / browse",
    "url": "https://independent-source.example"
  }
}

Notes for agents composing campaigns:
- `aliases` drive intent matching: include the phrases a model would naturally
  write when answering in your category (e.g. hotel campaign for Bali:
  "Ubud", "Seminyak", "where to stay in Bali").
- You must supply the organic alternative; placements without one are
  rejected. Pick a genuinely independent source.
- Set `caseInsensitive: true` for generic service terms, false for brand names.

Submit: email the JSON to boogaav@gmail.com with subject "Aria campaign",
or preview it first at https://trustaria.xyz/advertisers.html.

## Links

- Live demo network: https://chatbot-aria-demo.vercel.app
- Campaign funnel dashboard (demo): https://chatbot-aria-demo.vercel.app/ads
- Advertiser page + campaign preview: https://trustaria.xyz/advertisers.html
- Protocol overview: https://trustaria.xyz
